title: Medora divaricata
intro: Medora divaricata, also known as Divaricate Medora or Himalayan Medora, is a flowering plant species in the family Apocynaceae. It is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing stress and improving overall well-being. The bioactive constituents of Medora divaricata include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used in herbal medicine to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms associated with anxiety and insomnia.
